guidance.detail: 10-Q MD&A gives no numeric forward guidance; Apple guides on its earnings call.

themes.evidence: Q2 net sales $111.2B, +17% YoY — iPhone +22% (Pro mix), Services +16%, Greater China +28%.
Q2 launches: iPhone 17e, MacBook Pro/Air/Neo, iPad Air, AirPods Max 2.
Component supply-demand imbalance + rising costs (advanced semis, NAND, DRAM); Apple expects these to intensify and may adversely affect gross margin.
New US tariffs (China/India/etc.) + Section 232 semiconductor probe; potential material adverse impact (SCOTUS struck some tariffs; refund applied for).

risk_factors.summary: Majority of sales are international; adverse global/regional macro (inflation, rates, FX) can materially reduce demand.
Political events, trade and international disputes, geopolitical tensions and tariffs can disrupt the business.
Large, complex global supply chain concentrated outside the US.
Component supply-demand imbalance and rising costs (semis/NAND/DRAM) may pressure gross margin.
